title: oxalis ciliaris
intro: Oxalis ciliaris, also known as the Bermuda buttercup or Jamaica caper, is a perennial plant belonging to the wood sorrel family that is native to the tropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oxalis ciliaris include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, and its leaves and flowers can be used in salads for their tart flavor and potential health benefits.
